name: Scte35TimeSignalApos
description: Atypical configuration that applies segment breaks only on SCTE-35 time signal placement opportunities and breaks.

allOf.description: When specified, this offset (in milliseconds) is added to the input Ad Avail PTS time. This only applies to embedded SCTE 104/35 messages and does not apply to OOB messages.
When set to ignore, Segment Descriptors with noRegionalBlackoutFlag set to 0 will no longer trigger blackouts or Ad Avail slates
When set to ignore, Segment Descriptors with webDeliveryAllowedFlag set to 0 will no longer trigger blackouts or Ad Avail slates
